---
title: "Mary Anne Palmer"
---

## Mary Anne Palmer

**Dates:** (1805/6-1884)

### Description

sister of Caroline (Palmer) Abraham

### Biography

Daughter of Sir Charles Thomas Palmer, 2nd Bt.,  she lived near Mary Ann Dyson at Ewshott, Crondall, Hants, at the time of the 1871 census, when the Abrahams were staying with her.  Possibly the Miss Anne Palmer to whom there is a payment 1857.

### Letters

- Letter from December 30 [1871]
- Letter from Feb 26th [1864]
- Letter from March 22d [1855]
- Letter from June 9, 1854

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
